label: v002 — Polished POPX-on-WOBAR proof: Aizawa attractor chamber with full ctrl_master dashboard, audio reactivity, mirror compositing, palette cycling lights, recording pipeline
summary: From-scratch rebuild of the attractor_chamber after v001 was abandoned. Lives at /project1 (not /project1/base_attractor_chamber as v001 plan stated — Nick rebuilt directly into project1). Final architecture: SA Aizawa point cloud → instanced black-pearl PBR spheres → mirror-symmetric composite → atmospheric post → optional recorder. 22-parameter ctrl_master baseCOMP exposes high-leverage knobs across 6 pages (Audio, Material, Lighting, Camera, Composition, Form). Audio reactivity: only sa1.Timescale is bound (energy → speed), per Nick's directive — every other audio binding deferred for explicit user request. Two register tunings landed during session: (a) hard chaotic mushroom trip (toxic palette, ±18% breath, 35s orbit, exp 1.3 audio curve), (b) dark hypnotic crimson (red-family palette, ±10% breath, 80s orbit, exp 1.7 audio curve). Final palette delivered red-only (dark crimson → bright red → blood → vermillion / wine / mulberry / rust / mahogany / bone / taupe — pink killed at user request).

operations.description: POPX point chain — feedback path drives SA advection
operations.chain: pointgen1 (3000 sphere points) → sa1 (POPX SA, Aizawa, Solvermode='advect', Pointsupdatepop=null_pop_out, Timescale driven by audio energy) → math_velocity (mathmixPOP: comb0oper='length', PartVel → LenVel) → random_scale (randomPOP: type='uniform', valuea0=0.6, valueb0=1.4, outputattrscope='ScaleRand', deterministic per point index) → null_pop_out (terminal cap, also feeds back to sa1.Pointsupdatepop and forward to geo_attractor.instanceop)
operations.key_decision: ScaleRand is decoupled from velocity — earlier velocity-multiplied scale (LenVel * ScaleRand) caused spheres to balloon when audio pushed Timescale up. Pure ScaleRand keeps sizes stable through audio dynamics, only motion responds to audio.

operations.chain: geo_attractor (geometryCOMP) instances null_pop_out's points; child sphere_template (radx=0.06) + child mat (pbrMAT, 'black pearl': basecolor (0.012, 0.014, 0.022), metallic 0.92, roughness 0.10, specular 1.7); 4 lights (light1 warm orbit period 47s, light2 cool 67s opposite phase, light_rim earth/fixed, light_back pale orbit opposite camera 60s) all on palette-cycling cr/cg/cb expressions; environment1 (HDR qwantani_moon_noon at dimmer 0.6 for deep shadows); cam (orbit 80s, R=1.7, fov=32, ty=0.3, lookat=lookat_target)
operations.lookat_tracking: centroid_tracker (executeDAT, frameStart=True) reads null_pop_out.points('P'), computes mean × geo.scale, EMA-lerps lookat_target.tx/ty/tz with alpha=0.04. Required because Aizawa's instantaneous mass-center is not temporally stationary — chaotic distribution wanders.

operations.chain: render (renderTOP, geometry='geo_attractor', camera=cam, 720x1280 rgba16float, bgcolora=0) → bloom branch (blur_bloom size 32 → level_bloom brightness1=0.7 driven by ctrl.Bloomamount → comp_bloom screen-blend with render) → mirror_flip (flipx toggled by ctrl.Mirrorenable: 1 enables mirror, 0 makes max(A,A)=A passthrough) → mirror_comp (max blend of bloom + mirrored bloom = bilateral symmetric form) → comp_bg (ADD blend, input0=bg_black constantTOP, input1=mirror_comp; ADD works because render bgcolor is (0,0,0,0) so non-form pixels add nothing) → grain branch (grain_noise randomgpu mono → grain_blur size 1.4 → grain_level brightness1=-0.3 contrast 1.4 opacity driven by ctrl.Grainamount × 0.18 → comp_grain ADD) → null_out → rec_out (movieFileOut, codec=hap, audiochop=base_audio/audio_in, file path Nick-set)

operations.wiring: Every visual op param reads from ctrl_master via ParMode.EXPRESSION. Light dimmer baselines (5.0, 5.0, 1.1, 5.5) preserved as multipliers — Lightintensity scales them globally. Audio curve: 'Audiofloor + Audioceil * (max(0.0, energy)^Audioexp)' — max() clamp required because audio analysis returns tiny negative noise (~e-22) at silence which breaks non-integer exponents.

operations.rationale: User explicitly limited audio reactivity to ONE binding: speed of point motion. Other potential bindings (light dimmer flash on sub, bloom on energy, scale punch on kick, SA Ua morph on mid) deferred. Curve exponent ^1.7 means quiet sections hold near-still and builds ramp clearly.

operations.module_function: cycle(channel, period, t, comp) → palette[i0..i1] lerp

current_palettes_red_register.warm: dark crimson, bright red, blood, vermillion
current_palettes_red_register.cool: deep burgundy, wine, mulberry, cool blood
current_palettes_red_register.earth: rust, mahogany, dried blood, ember red
current_palettes_red_register.pale: bone, pale tan, cream, taupe (rose/coral KILLED — user said no pink)

operations.binding: Each light's cr/cg/cb has expression: PL.cycle('warm|cool|earth|pale', base_period * ctrl.Paletteperiodscale, absTime.seconds, 0|1|2). Base periods: warm 35s, cool 41s, earth 28s, pale 47s — non-syncing primes scaled by ctrl.Paletteperiodscale (default 2.6 for hypnotic register → effective 91s/107s/73s/122s).

operations.video: HAP codec, 720x1280, full chain via null_out
operations.audio: audiochop = /project1/base_audio/audio_in (raw stereo, same signal feeding audio_out playback)

operations.layout: Top-down rows at /project1: Y=-800 (ctrl_master), Y=-600 (base_audio), Y=-400 (POPX chain L→R + helpers), Y=-200 (geo_attractor + cam + 4 lights + env + HDR), Y=0 (render → bloom → mirror → comp_bg), Y=300 (grain → comp_grain → null_out → rec_out + palette_lights)

register_a_hard_chaotic_mushroom_trip.audio: floor 0.05, ceil 1.45, exp 1.3 — sharp beat punch
register_a_hard_chaotic_mushroom_trip.material: green-black tint (0.012, 0.022, 0.012), metallic 0.95, roughness 0.06, specular 2.0 — sharp anxious specular
register_a_hard_chaotic_mushroom_trip.lighting: intensity 1.0, env 0.6 (deep shadow), palette scale 1.0 (fast color thrash 28-47s)
register_a_hard_chaotic_mushroom_trip.palette: toxic: blood wine, sulfur, bilious green, bruise purple

register_b_dark_hypnotic_crimson_FINAL.audio: floor 0.10, ceil 1.10, exp 1.7 — slower buildup, never frozen
register_b_dark_hypnotic_crimson_FINAL.material: deep jewel-tone (0.012, 0.014, 0.022), metallic 0.92, roughness 0.10, specular 1.7 — softer hypnotic glow
register_b_dark_hypnotic_crimson_FINAL.palette: red-only: dark crimson → bright red → wine / mulberry / rust / mahogany / bone / taupe

lessons_for_debug_log: energy_audio_negative_noise_breaks_pow: audio analysis null_audio['energy'] returns tiny negative values (~e-22) at silence — `energy ** non_integer_exp` raises 'float() argument must be a string or a real number' (returns complex). ALWAYS wrap as `max(0.0, energy) ** exp`. Confirmed by /project1/sa1.Timescale error after expression set.

instance_scale_attribute_only: geometryCOMP.par.instancesx/y/z accept BARE attribute names ('ScaleRand'), NOT expressions ('LenVel*0.6'). For composite math, write the result to a new attribute via mathmixPOP (comb0oper='mult', scopea/b, comb0result='OutAttr') and read OutAttr as the bare instance scale. Earlier attempts at 'LenVel*0.6' silently failed to a fallback (string treated as missing attribute name).

popx_sa_strips_custom_attrs_through_advection: Custom attributes written upstream of POPX SA (e.g. 'ColorU' from randomPOP before sa1) are dropped at the SA output — only solver-managed attrs (P, PartVel, N, Color, LenVel) pass through. Write per-particle attrs DOWNSTREAM of SA, before geometryCOMP.instanceop chain.

lookuptexturePOP_attrnumcomps_alpha_quirk: lookuptexturePOP defaults to 4-component RGBA Color attribute even when only RGB is desired. Setting attrnumcomps='3' forces RGB-only — required to avoid alpha-from-R quirks that cause transparent/cyan-tinted instances when applypointcolor=True.

n_points_returns_typed_per_point: nullPOP.points('Color') returns list of TUPLES per point (not a flat float buffer). nullPOP.points('LenVel') returns list of FLOATS. Don't index as `arr[i*4+k]` — that gives a tuple back. Iterate as `pt = arr[i]; pt[component]`.

geometrycomp_instance_aim_via_rottoxyz: geometryCOMP supports orient-along-attribute via instancerottox/y/z = 'PartVel(0/1/2)' + instancerottoforward='posz'. Stretches an instance template's local Z axis along the velocity direction — combined with non-uniform sphere_template radx/rady < radz, gives comet-streak look. (Tried then reverted in this session — user wanted spheres not streaks).

noisetop_curl3d_in_feedback_loop_collapses_attractor: noisePOP curl3d on P injected upstream of SA's null_pop_out feedback compounds frame-over-frame, distorts attractor manifold over seconds. Apply noise OUT of the feedback loop (between null_pop_out and geo.instanceop) to keep SA structure intact. Tried both placements; abandoned overall.

rendertop_geometry_pattern_match: renderTOP.par.geometry is a glob pattern, NOT a SOP/COMP path. 'geo_attractor' renders only that COMP. 'geo*' renders all. '* ^geo_aura' includes all except geo_aura. Earlier attempt setting it as full path silently failed.

lumablurtop_versatile: input0=color, input1=mask (depth from depthTOP for true DOF, or color itself for luma-driven self-blur, or any custom mask). widthchan='luminance' on input1 drives blur amount per pixel. Tried both true DOF and luma-bloom — luma-bloom muddied form, killed.

compositetop_over_input_order: compositeTOP operand='over' treats input1 as TOP layer over input0. With form (alpha=0 on bg pixels) input0 + bg input1 gives FORM ON BLANK BG. With render bgcolor (0,0,0,0), ADD blend works as a simpler mental model (form RGB + bg RGB; non-form pixels = 0+bg = bg).

live_centroid_tracking_via_executedat: Aizawa attractor instantaneous mass-center is NOT temporally stationary. Hardcoded lookat target drifts off-center over 30-60s as particle distribution cycles around the manifold. Solution: executeDAT.onFrameStart computes mean of null_pop_out.points('P'), applies geo.scale, EMA-lerps target tx/ty/tz at alpha=0.04. ~0.4s lag time-constant — feels cinematic, not jitter.

td_custom_pars_via_appendcustompage: master = parent.create(baseCOMP); page = master.appendCustomPage('Name'); p = page.appendFloat('Pname', label='Display')[0]; p.default, p.val, p.normMin, p.normMax, p.clampMin, p.clampMax, p.min, p.max — full setup pattern. appendToggle for booleans. Read from expressions as op('ctrl_master').par.Pname.eval().

non_realtime_mode_audio_clicks_during_playback: TD's non-realtime/export mode renders every frame without skipping. Good for video export but causes audio clicks in playback because audio_out can't keep up with cooked-frame rate. Switch back to realtime for live audio reactivity tuning.
open_questions_for_future_iteration: Audio reactivity could expand to: sub → light dimmer flash on kick, mid → SA Ua/Ub morph for melody-driven shape change, energy → bloom intensity for build/drop dynamics, high → grain intensity for transient texture. All deferred per Nick's 'only speed binding' directive — revisit on a track-by-track basis.

Mirror compositing currently bilateral (vertical-flip max blend). Quadrant mirror (4-fold radial symmetry) could push the sigil/mandala register harder for some tracks. Single switchTOP with 3 modes (off / bilateral / quadrant) would expose this.

Audio analysis pipeline in /project1/base_audio is untouched — sub/bass/mid/high/energy channels available. Only energy is consumed. Worth surveying base_audio internals to confirm energy normalization (currently sits ~0.48 at idle which is suspect).

Form scale is decoupled from velocity (good). But form spread/density depends on numpoints which is hardcoded at pointgen1.par.numpoints=3000. Expose as ctrl_master.Numpoints if track-specific density tuning becomes desirable.
Recording: Hap is editing-friendly but huge file size. For final delivery may want h264/h265 swap. Audio currently mono routed from audio_in — confirm stereo preserved for delivery.
